2606.24192.title: Co-occurring associated retained concepts in Diffusion Unlearning
2606.24192.paper_summary: Unlearning has emerged as a key technique to mitigate harmful content generation in diffusion models. However, existing methods often remove not only the target concept, but also benign co-occurring concepts. As illustrated in Fig.1, unlearning nudity can unintentionally suppress the concept of person, preventing a model from generating images with person. We define these undesirably suppressed co-occurring concepts that must be preserved CARE (Co-occurring Associated REtained concepts). Then, we introduce the CARE score, a general metric that directly quantifies their preservation across unlearning tasks. With this foundation, we propose ReCARE (Robust erasure for CARE), a framework that explicitly safeguards CARE while erasing only the target concept. ReCARE automatically constructs the CARE-set, a curated vocabulary of benign co-occurring tokens extracted from target images, and leverages this vocabulary during training for stable unlearning. Extensive experiments across various target concepts (Nudity, Van Gogh style, and Tench object) demonstrate that ReCARE achieves overall state-of-the-art performance in balancing robust concept erasure, overall utility, and CARE preservation.
2606.24192.paper_summary_zh: 去學習已成為減少擴散模型中有害內容生成的關鍵技術。<lb/>然而，現有的方法往往不僅去除目標概念，還會去除良性的共現概念。<lb/>如圖1所示，去學習裸體概念可能無意中抑制了「人」的概念，從而阻止模型生成包含「人」的圖像。<lb/>我們將這些不希望被抑制的共現概念定義為CARE（共現關聯保留概念）。<lb/>接著，我們介紹了CARE分數，這是一個通用指標，直接量化它們在去學習任務中的保留情況。<lb/>在此基礎上，我們提出了ReCARE（針對CARE的穩健抹除），這是一個明確保護CARE的框架，同時僅抹除目標概念。<lb/>ReCARE自動構建CARE集，這是一個從目標圖像中提取的良性共現標記的策劃詞彙，並在訓練過程中利用這個詞彙以實現穩定的去學習。<lb/>在各種目標概念（裸體、梵谷風格和十ch物體）上的廣泛實驗表明，ReCARE在平衡穩健的概念抹除、整體效用和CARE保留方面達到了整體最先進的性能。
2606.24192.author: Miso Kim et.al.
2606.24192.authors: Miso Kim, Georu Lee, Yunji Kim, Hoki Kim, Jinseong Park, Woojin Lee
